fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontPaletteOverride` pairs a palette color index with a replacement color.
Supply a span of these values in <xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments.PaletteOverrides>
to customize individual palette entries when cloning a typeface.

The `Color` property stores a packed ARGB value (matching <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColor>
format: alpha in bits 31-24, red 23-16, green 15-8, blue 7-0).

## Examples

```csharp
var overrides = new SKFontPaletteOverride[]
{
    new SKFontPaletteOverride { Index = 0, Color = SKColors.Red },
};
var args = new SKFontArguments { PaletteOverrides = overrides };
using var modified = typeface.Clone(args);
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Represents an override that replaces a single color entry in a font color palette.
Gets or sets the replacement color as a packed ARGB value.
fields.value: A packed 32-bit ARGB color value (alpha in bits 31-24, red 23-16, green 15-8, blue 7-0).
